sealed_evaluation_policy.collision_check: sealed evaluation paths are handled only by build_curated_qa.py during isolated projection

projected_baseline.description: isolated cumulative training projection through context-merit v63

ranking.candidate_rule: remaining direct Rope365 technique rows with fragmentary answers, dangling clauses, ambiguous pronouns, or underspecified exercise context
ranking.score: manual full-source answer completeness and question naturalness review
